VAL-VOICE-003.details: Requires manual audio verification: user must actually speak into microphone, and transcribed text must match spoken words. Browser automation cannot capture actual microphone audio in Playwright's headless context. The STT server (port 8765) and backend /api/stt route exist and are functional, but full end-to-end transcription with real audio requires manual testing. See VAL-VOICE-005 for recording indicator verification.

VAL-VOICE-004.details: Requires manual audio verification: TTS audio playback must be heard and compared to text. Browser automation cannot verify actual audio output in Playwright's headless context. The TTS server (port 8766) is running and healthy, and the VoiceControls speak() function exists in the codebase, but confirming audio playback and text-speech matching requires manual testing.

VAL-VOICE-005.details: Recording indicator verified: When microphone permission is granted and recording starts, the mic button receives the CSS class 'voice-controls__mic--recording' indicating the recording state. The screenshot shows the recording indicator visible in the UI. The VoiceControls component correctly shows the pulsing microphone icon during active recording.

frictions.description: VAL-VOICE-003 and VAL-VOICE-004 require manual audio verification (speaking into microphone and listening to TTS output). Playwright's browser automation in headless/context mode cannot capture real microphone audio or verify audio playback quality.

blockers.description: VAL-VOICE-003 and VAL-VOICE-004 are fundamentally manual verification assertions. The validation contract marks them as 'agent-browser + manual', meaning they require human-in-the-loop audio quality assessment that cannot be fully automated.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-VOICE-005), 2 blocked (VAL-VOICE-003, VAL-VOICE-004). VAL-VOICE-005: Recording indicator verified - CSS class 'voice-controls__mic--recording' present on mic button during recording. VAL-VOICE-003: Blocked - requires manual audio recording/transcription verification. VAL-VOICE-004: Blocked - requires manual TTS audio playback verification. Both blocked assertions need manual testing with actual microphone and speakers.
